deep_dive.title: Toward Human-Centered Multi-Agent Systems: Integrating Cognition, Culture, Values, and Cooperation in AI Agents
deep_dive.abstract: The emergence of large language model (LLM)-based agents and multi-agent systems has enabled a shift from narrow task automation to more autonomous decision-making. Despite progress in language generation, planning, tool use, and coordination, most agents still treat intelligence as prediction, optimization, and task completion. Human environments are social and normative, where people reason under bounded rationality, communicate in culturally situated language, and make decisions guided by values, beliefs, trust, and social norms. This survey argues that future AI agents, especially those acting on behalf of humans, must move beyond task competence toward human-centered capabilities.   We review research across six areas: (1) evolution of intelligent agents, (2) human cognition and decision-making, (3) language, culture, and social context, (4) human values and belief systems, (5) human-agent collaboration, and (6) multi-agent coordination and modeling of human characteristics. We synthesize work from cognitive science, sociolinguistics, computational social science, and AI alignment, along with recent advances in LLM agents, cultural alignment benchmarks, preference learning, explainability, and agent societies. We identify a key gap: existing systems do not provide a unified framework integrating cognition, culture, values, and social behavior into autonomous agents. We conclude with directions for building culturally aware, value-aligned, cognitively grounded, and cooperative multi-agent systems.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: survey on human-centered multi-agent systems integrating cognition, culture, values, and cooperation for human-like AI agents
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 关于整合认知、文化、价值观与合作以实现AI智能体拟人化的综述
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 关于整合认知、文化、价值观与合作以实现AI智能体拟人化的综述
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 关于整合认知、文化、价值观与合作以实现AI智能体拟人化的综述
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This survey argues that future AI agents must be human-centered, integrating cognition, culture, values, and cooperation, moving beyond task competence to operate effectively in social and normative human environments.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该综述认为，未来AI智能体必须超越任务能力，转向以人为中心的能力，整合认知、文化、价值观与合作。当前大多数智能体仍将智能视为预测和优化，而真实人类环境充满社会规范和有限理性。论文回顾了跨学科研究，提出了人类中心多智能体系统的关键方向，强调智能体应像人类一样进行沟通、决策并遵循社会规范。这一框架为构建拟人化游戏AI bot提供了重要的设计原则和理论基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该综述认为，未来AI智能体必须超越任务能力，转向以人为中心的能力，整合认知、文化、价值观与合作。当前大多数智能体仍将智能视为预测和优化，而真实人类环境充满社会规范和有限理性。论文回顾了跨学科研究，提出了人类中心多智能体系统的关键方向，强调智能体应像人类一样进行沟通、决策并遵循社会规范。这一框架为构建拟人化游戏AI bot提供了重要的设计原则和理论基础。

quick_skim.title: Structure-Conditioned Actor-Critic Branches for Quality-Diversity Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Quality-diversity reinforcement learning (QD-RL) aims to construct policy repertoires that contain both high-performing and behaviorally diverse policies. Existing QD-RL methods mainly diversify policy instances after rollout evaluation or use learned value information to improve policy quality and behavior targeting, while the learning branches that generate candidate policies remain less explored. This paper proposes SV-QD-RL, a structure-value coupled framework that represents each candidate as a structure-conditioned actor-critic branch. Each branch contains an actor, a structural mask, a branch-specific critic, a replay state, and evaluation attributes including behavior, return, sparsity, and value profile. The structural mask defines the actor subspace in which the branch learns, while the branch-specific critic and replay state shape its value-learning trajectory. A branch-aware QD archive then evaluates and retains branches according to behavioral quality, structural footprint, and value-profile information. Experiments on MuJoCo continuous-control tasks show that SV-QD-RL constructs policy repertoires with strong archive quality and behaviorally useful diversity. Ablation and diagnostic analyses further indicate that structural conditioning, critic differentiation, and memory-consistent refinement make complementary contributions to behavioral specialization. Schedule-aware repertoire evaluation shows that the learned archive provides selectable policy alternatives under changing behavior-level requirements. These results suggest that coupling actor structure with branch-specific value learning is an effective mechanism for generating diverse QD-RL policy repertoires.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: quality-diversity RL generates diverse policies, enabling human-like varied game AI behaviors
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 质量-多样性RL生成多样化策略，可实现拟人化行为多变的游戏AI
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 质量-多样性RL生成多样化策略，可实现拟人化行为多变的游戏AI
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 质量-多样性RL生成多样化策略，可实现拟人化行为多变的游戏AI
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SV-QD-RL, a structure-value coupled framework that generates candidate policies via structure-conditioned actor-critic branches; enhances policy diversity and performance; applicable to human-like game AI bot repertoire creation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有质量-多样性RL方法主要依赖后续评估进行多样化而未充分探索策略生成分支的问题，提出结构-价值耦合的SV-QD-RL框架，将每个候选策略表示为一个结构条件的演员-评论家分支，通过结构掩码和分支特定评论家促进多样性。实验证实该方法能生成高回报且行为多样的策略集合，为构建行为丰富的拟人化游戏AI bot提供了新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有质量-多样性RL方法主要依赖后续评估进行多样化而未充分探索策略生成分支的问题，提出结构-价值耦合的SV-QD-RL框架，将每个候选策略表示为一个结构条件的演员-评论家分支，通过结构掩码和分支特定评论家促进多样性。实验证实该方法能生成高回报且行为多样的策略集合，为构建行为丰富的拟人化游戏AI bot提供了新途径。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning techniques for training game AI
